content.title: Custom Outdoor Living Spaces Designed Around Your Lifestyle
content.subtitle: From outdoor kitchens and fire features to pergolas, lighting, and entertainment areas, We design and builds custom outdoor living spaces that bring comfort, beauty, and value to your space.

content.title: Transform Your Backyard Into a Functional and Elegant Retreat
content.ctaText: Inspired? Request your Free Estimate now!
content.description: Transform your backyard into a custom outdoor living destination designed around the way you live. From outdoor kitchens and fire features to pergolas, pavilions, lighting, and entertainment areas, Maxima Concrete provides complete design-build solutions that blend beauty, comfort, and functionality. Our experienced in-house team handles every step of the process, creating outdoor spaces that enhance your lifestyle and add lasting value to your home.

content.title: Custom Outdoor Living Design & Construction
content.subtitle: Built Around Your Lifestyle
content.description:
Every outdoor space we create is designed around how you live, entertain, and relax. Our experienced designers help you plan every detail, ensuring your yard becomes an extension of your home.

We handle everything — from the initial design consultation to final installation — making the entire process smooth, efficient, and stress-free.

Our Outdoor Living Solutions Include:

• Custom Outdoor Kitchens — fully equipped with built-in grills, pizza ovens, and weatherproof concrete countertops.

• Professional Outdoor Lighting — modern systems that enhance safety and ambiance for nighttime entertaining. Fire Features & Ambiance — fireplaces, fire pits, and lighting that create warmth and atmosphere.

• Shelters & Shade Structures — pergolas, gazebos, and pavilions designed for comfort and protection year-round.

• Hardscapes & Patios — durable, elegant concrete finishes that define and elevate your backyard.

content.title: Why Choose Maxima Concrete for Outdoor Living Projects

benefits.text: 15+ Years of Expertise in Central Ohio.

options: Built-in grills and wood-fired pizza ovens

content.bottomText: With Maxima Concrete, every outdoor kitchen is designed to be both functional and visually stunning — a centerpiece for entertainment and everyday living.
content.description: We integrate high-performance materials like marine-grade stainless steel and sealed concrete countertops that resist weather and wear.

steps.title: Build & Install

steps.title: Enjoy & Maintain
steps.description: Sit back and relax while your new outdoor space enhances your lifestyle and property value.

content.title:
Lighting, Shelters &
Year-Round Comfort
content.description:
A beautiful outdoor space should shine day and night. Our outdoor lighting systems combine function and style, illuminating paths, patios, and architecture with energy-efficient solutions.

We also design shelters and shade structures — pergolas, gazebos, and pavilions — that enhance comfort while protecting against the elements. Each is engineered for durability and crafted to complement your home's design.
content.rightDescription:
Extend the beauty and functionality of your outdoor space long after the sun goes down. Professionally designed outdoor lighting enhances safety, improves visibility, and creates a warm, inviting atmosphere for entertaining and relaxing. Our custom lighting solutions highlight architectural features, walkways, patios, landscaping, and outdoor living areas while adding security and curb appeal. Whether you're looking for subtle accent lighting or a complete outdoor illumination system, we create solutions tailored to your property and lifestyle.

Our process is simple:
